title: Uruguayan Roasted Courgette Bake
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring roasted courgettes baked in a flavorful mixture.
instructions: Slice the courgettes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, toss the courgette slices with olive oil, Uruguayan chimichurri sauce, salt, and pepper.
Arrange the courgette slices in a single layer in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the courgettes are tender and lightly browned.
While the courgettes are baking, prepare the topping by mixing the grated cheddar cheese with chopped red onion and minced garlic.
Remove the courgettes from the oven and top with the cheese mixture.
Return the baking dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
